Table summary. Document: docs/communications/leadership-review-packet.md. Purpose: Summarize the overall situation, diagnosis, structure, decisions, roadmap, and risks for leadership.. Owner: Pastor / leadership team. Status: Ready for review. Review needed by: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee. Priority: High. Notes: Use to align leaders before committee or church action.. Document: docs/00-project-brief.md. Purpose: State the purpose, current situation, deeper issue, and desired future state.. Owner: Project lead TBD. Status: Ready for review. Review needed by: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee. Priority: High. Notes: Good orientation document for new reviewers.. Document: docs/01-current-state-assessment.md. Purpose: Summarize current gaps in roles, committee ownership, manual processes, software, spending, budget, and documentation.. Owner: Project lead TBD. Status: Needs committee input. Review needed by: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee. Priority: High. Notes: Should be validated before being used publicly.. Document: docs/implementation-roadmap.md. Purpose: Organize immediate, 30-day, 60-day, 90-day, and long-term manual integration work.. Owner: Finance Committee / project lead TBD. Status: Needs committee input. Review needed by: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Pastor, Deacons. Priority: High. Notes: Useful for sequencing decisions.. Document: docs/document-inventory.md. Purpose: Inventory active drafts, templates, and source materials.. Owner: Document owner TBD. Status: Ready for review. Review needed by: Project lead / document maintainer. Priority: Medium. Notes: Keep updated as documents are added or retired.. Document: docs/document-workflow-upgrade-notes.md. Purpose: Capture lessons from the prior Personnel Committee repository and recommended workflow improvements.. Owner: Project lead TBD. Status: Ready for review. Review needed by: Personnel Committee, document maintainers. Priority: Medium. Notes: Notes what to keep, what to improve, and what sensitive material should stay out of this repo.. Document: docs/project-dashboard.md. Purpose: Track major documents, owners, statuses, review needs, priority, and notes.. Owner: Project lead TBD. Status: Ready for review. Review needed by: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee. Priority: High. Notes: Should be updated after committee decisions.. Document: docs/02-decision-log.md. Purpose: Record decisions, owners, status, and notes.. Owner: Project lead TBD. Status: Needs committee input. Review needed by: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Nominating Committee. Priority: High. Notes: June 28, 2026 Bookkeeper authorization has been recorded; confirm against official minutes.. Document: docs/03-open-questions.md. Purpose: Track unresolved questions for committees, leadership, congregation, and professional review.. Owner: Project lead TBD. Status: Needs committee input. Review needed by: All reviewers. Priority: High. Notes: Should drive meeting agendas; role creation is authorized, but details still need answers.. Document: docs/governance/constitution-and-bylaws-reference.md. Purpose: Provide quick access to the 2018 Constitution, Bylaws, and Covenant source and key review questions.. Owner: Church / Clerk TBD. Status: Needs bylaw review. Review needed by: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Nominating Committee. Priority: High. Notes: Confirm this is the current authoritative version before relying on it for final decisions.. Document: docs/governance/church-organization-chart.md. Purpose: Show a draft church governance and financial-operations org chart.. Owner: Pastor / leadership team. Status: Needs bylaw review. Review needed by: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Nominating Committee. Priority: High. Notes: Clarifies authority, committee lanes, and coordination lines without treating them as final.. Document: docs/governance/responsibility-matrix.md. Purpose: Clarify ownership among Treasurer, Bookkeeper, Finance, Personnel, Nominating, Pastor, Deacons, and Congregation.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs bylaw review. Review needed by: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Nominating Committee, Pastor, Deacons. Priority: High. Notes: Reflects June 28 Bookkeeper authorization, Personnel hiring authority, Nominating coordination, and Finance budget-adjustment responsibility; still needs bylaw/practice check..
